manifest.name: YTSummarizer

name: YTSummarizer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# YTSummarizer v0.2.6

YTSummarizer is an Obsidian plugin that fetches YouTube transcripts and generates summaries using OpenAI GPT models.

## What's New in This Version

- Added compatibility with Obsidian 1.7.2 and above
- Improved performance by using `Vault.process` instead of `Vault.modify` for file operations
- Updated UI text to comply with Obsidian standards
- Improved settings tab layout
- Updated documentation and added screenshots

## Features

- Fetch transcripts from YouTube videos
- Generate summaries of video content using OpenAI GPT models
- View transcripts in the sidebar or create new notes with transcripts and summaries
- Interactive timestamps that link directly to specific points in the video
- Customizable timestamp frequency
- Support for different languages and country codes
- Configurable OpenAI model selection

## Installation

1. Open Obsidian Settings
2. Go to Community Plugins and disable Safe Mode
3. Click on Browse and search for "YTSummarizer"
4. Install the plugin and enable it

## Requirements

- An OpenAI API key is required for the summary generation feature

## Acknowledgments

This plugin is heavily inspired by and builds upon Łukasz Strzępek's [YTranscript](https://github.com/lstrzepek/obsidian-yt-transcript) plugin.
releases.name: YTSummarizer v0.2.6 - YouTube Transcript and Summary Generator

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

### Major Features
- **OpenAI Summary Integration**: Generate concise summaries of YouTube videos using OpenAI GPT models
- **New Note Creation**: Option to create a new note with transcript and summary instead of just viewing in sidebar
- **Accordion Transcript View**: Collapsible transcript section for better readability
- **Progressive Loading**: See content as it loads - first transcript, then summary

### UI Improvements
- **Two-Button Modal**: Choose between sidebar view or new note creation when entering a URL
- **Loading Indicators**: Clear status messages showing progress during transcript and summary generation
- **Improved Layout**: Summary appears at the top of new notes for better information hierarchy

### Technical Improvements
- **Full English Localization**: All UI elements and messages are now in English
- **Improved Error Handling**: Better feedback when transcript or summary generation fails
- **Code Refactoring**: Cleaner, more maintainable codebase

## How to Use New Features

### Creating Notes with Summaries
1. Click the YouTube icon in the sidebar or use the command palette
2. Enter a YouTube URL
3. Select "Create New Note" from the modal
4. A new note will be created with the summary at the top and collapsible transcript below

### Configuration
- Set your OpenAI API key in the plugin settings
- Choose your preferred GPT model (GPT-4o Mini, GPT-3.5 Turbo, or GPT-4o)
- Customize the summary prompt if desired

## Requirements
- Obsidian v0.15.0 or higher
- OpenAI API key for summary generation
releases.name: v0.2.1: OpenAI Summary Integration & UI Improvements Latest
